mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM rsi_analysis r INNER JOIN etf_info e ON e.etf_code = r.code WHERE e.enabled = 1 AND e.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.is_buy_signal DESC, r.current_rsi ASC, r.period ASC, r.data_time DESC
SELECT * FROM rsi_analysis WHERE code = #{code} AND period = #{period} ORDER BY data_time DESC LIMIT 1
